zh.lifeSummary: 當Siemowit IV Piast於大約1353年出生時，他的父親Siemowit III Piast34歲，母親Eufemia Přemyslovna36歲。他於1387年與Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz在波蘭沃也奧特沃 維利n斯吉維爾紐斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1426年1月21日在波蘭沃吉享年74歲，埋葬在波蘭沃吉波維亞特 沃吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Siemowit IV Piast于大约1353年出生时，他的父亲Siemowit III Piast34岁，母亲Eufemia Přemyslovna36岁。他于1387年与Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz在波兰沃也奧特沃 維利n斯吉維爾紐斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1426年1月21日在波兰沃吉享年74岁，埋葬在波兰沃吉波維亞特 沃吉。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Siemowit IV Piast was born about 1353, his father, Siemowit III Piast, was 34 and his mother, Eufemia Přemyslovna, was 36. He married Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz in 1387, in Vilna, Wilno Voivodeship, Poland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 21 January 1426, in Płock, Poland, at the age of 74, and was buried in Płock Uyezd, Płock, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Siemowit IV Piast est né environ 1353, son père, Siemowit III Piast, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Eufemia Přemyslovna, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz en 1387, à Vilnius, Województwo Wileńskie, Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 21 janvier 1426, à płockie, Pologne, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Powiat płocki, płockie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Siemowit IV Piast um 1353 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Siemowit III Piast 34 und seine Mutter Eufemia Přemyslovna 36. Er hat 1387 in Vilnius, Województwo Wileńskie, Polen Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Januar 1426 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Woiwodschaft Płock, Polen und wurde in Powiat płocki, płockie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Siemowit IV Piast è nato il circa 1353, il suo padre, Siemowit III Piast, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Eufemia Přemyslovna, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz nel 1387, nel Vilnius, Województwo Wileńskie, Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 21 gennaio 1426, nel płockie, Polonia, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Powiat płocki, płockie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Siemowit IV Piastが約1353年に生まれた時，父Siemowit III Piastは34歳，母Eufemia Přemyslovnaは36歳であった。1387年にポーランドウオジュoドズトウオ ウィレnスキヴィルニウスでAleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowiczと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1426年1月21日にポーランドプlオクイで74歳で死去し，ポーランドプlオクイポウィアト プlオクイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Siemowit IV Piast(이)가 대략 1353년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Siemowit III Piast(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Eufemia Přemyslovna(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1387년 폴란드 보jwo드즈트보 윌n스키 비니우스에서 Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1426년 1월 21일 폴란드 pl옥키에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 pl옥키 파위앳 pl옥키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Siemowit IV Piast nasceu aproximadamente 1353, seu pai, Siemowit III Piast, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Eufemia Přemyslovna, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz em 1387, em Vilnius, Województwo Wileńskie, Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de janeiro de 1426, em płockie, Polônia, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Powiat płocki, płockie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Siemowit IV Piast родился около 1353 г., его отцу по имени Siemowit III Piast было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Eufemia Přemyslovna, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz в 1387 г. в местности Вильно, Виленское воеводство, Польша. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 21 января 1426 г. в местности Плоцкое воеводство, Польша в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности Плоцкий уезд, Плоцкая губерния, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Siemowit IV Piast nació aproximadamente 1353, su papá, Siemowit III Piast, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Eufemia Přemyslovna, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Aleksandra Olgierdówna Giedyminowicz en 1387, en Vilnius, Województwo Wileńskie, Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 21 de enero de 1426, en płockie, Polonia, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Powiat płocki, płockie, Polonia.
